automations.name: 30-Day WhatsApp Renewal Reminder (Spanish)
automations.template_text: Hola {{client_name}}, le recordamos que su póliza de seguro con {{carrier}} vence el {{renewal_date}}. Por favor contáctenos para renovar. Millennium Insurance - Clarksville, TN

automations.name: 7-Day WhatsApp Renewal Reminder (Spanish)
automations.template_text: Hola {{client_name}}, su póliza de seguro vence en 7 días ({{renewal_date}}). Llámenos hoy para evitar interrupciones en su cobertura. Millennium Insurance

automations.name: Non-Pay Alert (English SMS)
automations.template_text: Hi {{client_name}}, this is Millennium Insurance. We noticed a payment issue on your {{carrier}} policy. Please call us at your earliest convenience to avoid a lapse in coverage.

automations.name: Post-Retention Google Review Request (English SMS)
automations.template_text: Hi {{client_name}}, thank you for renewing your policy with Millennium Insurance! If you had a great experience, we would appreciate a Google review: {{google_review_link}}

automations.name: Lapsed Client Reactivation (English SMS)
automations.template_text: Hi {{client_name}}, your {{carrier}} insurance policy has lapsed. Millennium Insurance can help you get reinstated quickly. Call us today for a quote!
